urdu transliteration text: Murjhaaya huwa hai. jungle mein kiyon gulshenay zahra aey badal.
english translation text: O cloud why is Zahra’s flower garden wilting in the jungle.

Paamaal nonihaale Taazaa hai. her phool hay sookha aey badal.
O cloud her fresh flowers have been trampled and left parched.

urdu transliteration text:
Wo kerbobla mein khaimay jaley,Shabbir kay bacchay rotey rahey.
Shabbirs children are crying in burning tents of kerbala
Derya say tau pani aaya nahi.Ab tu hi berasja aey baadel.
english translation text: Since water didn't come from the river. why don't you rain down some water oh cloud?

urdu transliteration text: Woh fakheray sulaiman ki baiti. Bay perda chali hay balwey mein.
english translation text: Sulaiman's pride, his daughter, is made to go bareheaded in public.

urdu transliteration text: Taareek ghataoun ko laa ker tu ker dey andhera aye baadel.
english translation text:
Gather all the dark clouds together and make the darken the skies,
O cloud!

urdu transliteration text: Suntay hain kay faujay aada bhi, munh phair kay rotee jaati thi.
english translation text: We hear that even the enemies were turning their face away and crying.

urdu transliteration text: Dushman say bhi dekha jaa na saka asgher ka tarapna ay baadel.
english translation text: Even the enemies couldn't see Asgher’s pain O cloud!

urdu transliteration text: Abbas ko mashkeeza dey ker,Ouper jo sakina nay dekha.
english translation text: While giving the mashkiza to abbas sakina looked up at you.

urdu transliteration text: Helka sa ishara bechhi ka kiya tu nay naa samjha aye badel.
english translation text:
You could not understand her gesture as a plea for rain,
O cloud!
